---
title: Algebra I - Easy Factorising Sheet
date: 2026-03-27
categories: [algebra]
---

# Algebra I: Easy Factorising Practice

---

### Part A: Factorising Quadratics (Simple)
1. Factorise: $x^{2} + 7x + 10$
2. Factorise: $x^{2} + 4x - 12$
3. Factorise: $x^{2} - 6x + 9$

---

### Part B: Common Factor
4. Factorise: $6x + 15$
5. Factorise: $8a^{2} - 12a$
6. Factorise: $5y^{3} - 20y^{2}$

---

### Part C: Difference of Squares + Grouping
7. Factorise: $x^{2} - 16$
8. Factorise: $9m^{2} - 25$
9. Factorise: $x^{2} + 5x + 6 - (x + 2)$

---

### Bonus (Optional): Check your answers
- $x^{2} + 7x + 10 = (x + 2)(x + 5)$
- $x^{2} + 4x - 12 = (x + 6)(x - 2)$
- $x^{2} - 6x + 9 = (x - 3)^{2}$
- $6x + 15 = 3(2x + 5)$
- $8a^{2} - 12a = 4a(2a - 3)$
- $5y^{3} - 20y^{2} = 5y^{2}(y - 4)$
- $x^{2} - 16 = (x - 4)(x + 4)$
- $9m^{2} - 25 = (3m - 5)(3m + 5)$
- $x^{2} + 5x + 6 - (x + 2) = (x + 2)(x + 3) - (x + 2) = (x + 2)(x + 2)$
